source: Factorization Meets the Item Embedding- Regularizing Matrix Factorization with Item Co-occurrence

concepts.finding: Regularizing matrix factorization with item embeddings from co-occurrence improves recommendation quality. Combining MF interaction signal with embedding similarity signal produces better representations than either alone.
concepts.implication: Hybrid approach: combine matrix factorization (explicit keyword-intent interactions) with embedding-based similarity (keyword-keyword and intent-intent similarities) for robust keyword-intent matching.
concepts.open_question: What is the optimal combination weight for MF (explicit signals) vs embedding similarity (implicit signals) in keyword-intent models?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: A combined MF + embedding model for keyword-intent scoring outperforms either pure MF or pure embedding model in recall@K and NDCG.
